---
title: "Helene, duchesse d\'Orleans"
---

## Helene, duchesse d\'Orleans

**Dates:** (1814-1858)

### Description

daughter-in-law of Louis Philippe

### Biography

She was the widow of Louis Philippe\'s eldest son Ferdinand Philippe d\'Orléans, duc d’Orleans (1810-1842).

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 14th [1853]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
